features.name: procedural_block_with_partial_bit_select_assignment
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block that assigns to individual bits of a vector using procedural assignments

features.name: concat_of_extract_from_undefined_value
features.description: Code should include a concat operation that uses an extract result, where the extracted value is defined after the concat reference
features.snippet:
%0 = comb.extract %1 from 2 : (i4) -> i2
%1 = comb.concat %0, %b, %a : i2, i1, i1

features.name: combinational_feedback_through_concat_extract
features.description: Code should include a combinational signal formed by extract and concat operations where the extract source is the concat result itself
